data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an 'emergency override (manager can force assignment)', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality exists or is operational. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but the evidence does not demonstrate any implementation or testing of this specific requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the emergency override functionality.
gaps: No evidence of the emergency override functionality being implemented or tested.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for emergency override functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the manager can force assignment through the emergency override feature.
